TinyTorch is a lightweight, educational framework designed to help learners understand how deep learning systems work from the ground up, without the abstraction of large production libraries. If you haven’t explored it yet, the holiday break can be a great time to tinker and experiment at your own pace.

As a reminder, there are just two days left to take advantage of the SEEED 20% discount code (VWP6YDXH) mentioned during the livestream. If you’ve been considering a kit, now’s a great time as the code expires on 12/24.

As we wrap up the year, we want to thank you again for being part of this growing community. We’re excited about what’s ahead in the new year and look forward to sharing more workshops, resources, and opportunities to learn together.

Wishing you a happy, healthy start to the new year.

All my best,
Kari Janapareddi

Director of Partnerships and Strategic Operations
Machine Learning Systems Education

item.title: Thank You for Joining the MLSysBook.ai Community Celebration
item.dc:creator: Kari Janapareddi
item.description:
Hello everyone,

Thanks to those of you who joined us today for the MLSysBook.ai 10K Stars Community Celebration—and a very warm welcome to those of you who subscribed today. We’re grateful you’re here and excited to have you as part of this growing global community.

If you missed it, here are the links…

To the livestream

To the slides

RECAP: During the livestream, we shared how MLSysBook.ai is evolving into an open, living resource for machine learning systems education and how this work is being amplified worldwide through community-led outreach. We highlighted global workshops, online show & tell spaces, and the open sharing of student projects, and real-world deployments. All of this is made possible by a remarkable group of volunteers, educators, and partners who believe in making ML systems education accessible everywhere.

If you’d like to support this work (click here!), donations directly fund workshops, kit donations, and the continued development of open educational materials. As a small thank-you:

  • Every donation of $100 or more today receives a free Edge AI mug

  • All new subscribers & donators today are entered to win a free SEEED XIAOML kit

And a reminder—this week only, you can get 20% off SEEED XIAOML kits using our special community discount code (VWP6YDXH) during checkout.

We’d also love to hear from you. If there are topics, workshops, tools, or community activities you’d like to see in the future, please reply to this email and let us know! Your feedback helps shape where we go next.

Thank you again for being part of this milestone moment. Your curiosity, participation, and support help us continue building an inclusive, global ML systems community.

All my best,
Kari Janapareddi
On behalf of the MLSysBook Community

item.title: MLSysBook.ai Live Event: Global Community Updates + AMA
item.dc:creator: MLSysBook Team
item.description:
Hello and welcome to the MLSysBook community!

We’re excited to invite you to an upcoming live MLSysBook.ai community event tomorrow (Wednesday Dec 17th, 10EST) . You can find the full event details and RSVP via our LinkedIn event page here:
https://www.linkedin.com/events/7402387002232520704/

This event is a snapshot of what our community has been building together. We’ll share highlights from our global outreach efforts, including how educators and volunteers around the world are coordinating hands-on workshops, running online community spaces, and openly sharing learning materials, tools, and real-world ML systems projects. At the heart of this work is a simple goal: making machine learning systems education accessible, practical, and truly global.

We’ll wrap things up with an open AMA with Professor Vijay Janapa Reddi. This is your chance to ask questions about the MLSysBook vision, the evolving ML systems discipline, community priorities, and what’s coming next.

We hope you’ll join us, bring your curiosity, and be part of the conversation.

Sincerely,

The MLSysBook Community Team
